productDisplayName: Allen Solly Kids Girls Twill Black Trousers
description: Style NoteGet your little one up and about in a pair of trousers from allen solly that plays as hard as she does. Team this with a white tee and crocs footwear when you take her out. The soft cotton fabric will keep her feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.Product DetailsBlack trousers, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets at the back, waist with belt loops, button and metal zipper, embroidery at the hip pocket at the back and a floral fabric beltMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldDelicate cycleDo not bleach or iron on printWarm iron when neededTumble dry low or lay flat to dry
